mapper.sql: SELECT a.archive_id, a.selection_id, a.student_id, stu.real_name AS student_name, stu.student_no, a.stage_name, a.file_id, f.original_name AS file_name, f.file_size, f.mime_type, a.remark, a.status, a.reviewer_id, rev.real_name AS reviewer_name, a.review_comment, DATE_FORMAT(a.review_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS review_time, s.topic_id, pt.topic_name, s.custom_topic_name, s.is_custom_topic, s.teacher_id, tea.real_name AS teacher_name, tea.teacher_no, s.campus_name, s.academic_year, DATE_FORMAT(a.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS create_time, DATE_FORMAT(a.update_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS update_time FROM doc_archive a LEFT JOIN project_selection s ON a.selection_id = s.selection_id AND s.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_user stu ON a.student_id = stu.user_id AND stu.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN project_topic pt ON s.topic_id = pt.topic_id AND pt.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_user tea ON s.teacher_id = tea.user_id AND tea.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_user rev ON a.reviewer_id = rev.user_id AND rev.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN doc_file f ON a.file_id = f.file_id AND f.is_deleted = 0 WHERE a.is_deleted = 0
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(a.archive_id) FROM doc_archive a LEFT JOIN project_selection s ON a.selection_id = s.selection_id AND s.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_user stu ON a.student_id = stu.user_id AND stu.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN project_topic pt ON s.topic_id = pt.topic_id AND pt.is_deleted = 0 WHERE a.is_deleted = 0 AND s.teacher_id = #{req.teacherId}
AND s.academic_year LIKE CONCAT(#{req.academicYear}, '%')
AND a.stage_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.stageName}, '%')
AND (stu.real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.keyword}, '%') OR stu.student_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.keyword}, '%') OR pt.topic_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.keyword}, '%') OR a.stage_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.keyword}, '%'))
